recommendations.title: The 6th Man
recommendations.overview: A college athlete returns from the dead to help his brother's basketball team win the NCAA title.

recommendations.title: CBGB
recommendations.overview: A look at New York's dynamic punk rock scene through the lens of the ground-breaking Lower East Side club started by eccentric Hilly Kristal in 1973 which launched thousands of bands.

recommendations.title: Nobel Son

recommendations.title: Come As You Are

recommendations.title: Class Act

recommendations.title: The Wing or the Thigh?
recommendations.overview: Charles Duchemin, a well-known gourmet and publisher of a famous restaurant guide, is waging a war against fast food entrepreneur Tri- catel to save the French art of cooking. After having agreed to appear on a talk show to show his skills in naming

recommendations.title: Saint Amour
recommendations.overview: Every year, Bruno makes a tour of all the wine stands, without setting foot outside the Show’s premises and without ever finishing his wine trail. This year, his father suggests they finish it together, but a real wine trail, across the French countr

recommendations.title: Sideways
recommendations.overview: Two middle-aged men embark on a spiritual journey through Californian wine country. One is an unpublished novelist suffering from depression, and the other is only days away from walking down the aisle.

recommendations.title: A Cat in Paris
recommendations.overview: A thrilling mystery that unfurls in the alleys and on the rooftops of the French capital, Paris, over the course of one adventurous evening.

recommendations.title: The Last Prosecco
recommendations.overview: The suicide of a prominent wine producer unleashes a series of mysterious murders.
